methods.description: Description of the Piraquara I Reservoir and the sampling sites used for data collection.

steps.description: The Piraquara I Reservoir is a man-made public water supply located in an Environmental Protection Area.
steps.searchable_summary: describe the location and characteristics of the Piraquara I Reservoir

methods.method_name: Data Collection and Trophic State Index Calculation
methods.description: Collection of physical and chemical data from the reservoir and calculation of the Trophic State Index (TSI).

steps.description: The physical and chemical data were provided by the Paraná Environmental Institute (IAP) and SANEPAR.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain physical and chemical data from IAP and SANEPAR

steps.description: The Trophic State Index (TSI) was calculated according to Lamparelli (2004).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Trophic State Index using Lamparelli method

methods.description: Collection of periphytic samples from natural and artificial substrates in the reservoir.

steps.description: Samplings were carried out seasonally from October 2007 to August 2008 at two sampling stations.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct seasonal sampling at specified stations

steps.description: Periphytic samples were obtained from stems of the macrophyte Polygonum hydropiperoides collected near the reservoir margin.
steps.searchable_summary: collect periphytic samples from macrophyte stems

steps.description: Glass slides were used as artificial substrates fixed to woody frames submerged in the water column for 30 days.
steps.searchable_summary: use glass slides as artificial substrates for periphyton collection

methods.description: Treatment of collected samples and analysis of diatoms using microscopy.

steps.description: Substrate fragments were fixed in Transeau's solution.
steps.searchable_summary: fix substrate fragments in Transeau's solution

steps.description: Samples were treated by oxidation according to Simonsen's method modified by Moreira-Filho & Valente-Moreira.
steps.searchable_summary: oxidize samples using modified Simonsen method

steps.description: Material was air-dried onto glass slides and mounted in Naphrax resin for microscopy.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare samples on glass slides with Naphrax resin for microscopy

steps.description: Observations, measurements, and diatom photomicrographs were performed at 1000× magnification.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze diatoms using microscopy at 1000× magnification

steps.description: Diatom identification was performed up to the lowest level of taxonomic hierarchy based on literature.
steps.searchable_summary: identify diatoms to lowest taxonomic level using literature
